label.purpose: Badges, table headers, form labels, helper text.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Inputs, buttons, small controls at rest.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Cards and panels. Tinted toward brand ink.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The committed action. Two-step darkening on hover then press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: #2a6695; color: #ffffff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04), 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1f4e74; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #163a57; transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #3a7fb3; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action on a hairline border with tint hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #0f1729; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #eef6fb; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #3a7fb3; }

components.name: Default Badge
components.description: Pill tag, tint background with deep-ink text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #d8eaf4; color: #163a57; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Hairline field with brand focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #0f1729; font-size: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7689; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #3a7fb3; }

components.name: Card
components.description: White surface lifted by a tinted ambient shadow plus hairline border.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #0f1729; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(15 35 60 / 0.06), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(15 35 60 / 0.05); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 6px 0 0; font-size: 14px; color: #6b7689; }

narrative.overview: Eurospital Eventi is the booking layer for a medical organization's events. The interface earns trust by getting out of the way: calm blues, generous whitespace, one quiet accent. Built on shadcn/ui over Tailwind with a single blue identity scale. Density is medium, depth is real but soft, buttons feel physical. It rejects dark-mode dashboards, neon gradients, gradient text, and decorative glassmorphism.
keyCharacteristics: One blue identity scale; color used sparingly and meaningfully
Layered depth: low ambient shadows separate surfaces
Tactile, confident buttons with visible hover and active states
Medium density, comfortable for long admin tables
System sans for fast, neutral, native-feeling reading

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: Exactly one identity hue. Every accent, link, focus ring, and primary action draws from the brand scale.

rules.name: The Status-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Red, green, and amber appear only to communicate state. Never decorative.

rules.name: The Hierarchy-Not-Weight Rule
rules.body: Rank through scale and weight contrast, not color. Colored text is reserved for links and status.

rules.name: The Tinted-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Card shadows carry the brand ink hue (rgb 15 35 60), never pure black.

dos: Do keep one blue identity scale for every accent and action.
Do use the two-step button darkening (deep, hover, active) for tactile feedback.
Do lift surfaces with the tinted Card shadow plus a hairline border.
Do reserve red / green / amber strictly for status.
Do cap long-form text at 65-75ch and lead hierarchy with scale and weight.
donts: Don't introduce a second brand hue or any gradient accent.
Don't ship dark mode by default; this is a calm, light medical product.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism or blur as ornament.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't let the calendar fall back to its default library colors.
